channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: You can now use X Premium subscriptions in Hermes Agent, and Hermes Agent can now search X posts.x.a...

item.title: @elonmusk: I was discussing with Grok the topic of "how to build a life on the Moon." Then Grok offered to show...
item.description: I was discussing with Grok the topic of "how to build a life on the Moon." Then Grok offered to show me what the construction of the first lunar city would look like. Grok Imagine animated them, and here's the result.

item.title: @elonmusk: New Template Batch Drop SELFIE modeled by@paranoidreamClassic Bedroom Mirrorgrok.com/imagine/templat...
item.description: New Template Batch Drop SELFIE modeled by@paranoidreamClassic Bedroom Mirrorgrok.com/imagine/templates/8…Post-Shower Fresh Lookgrok.com/imagine/templates/0…Gym Mirror Confidencegrok.com/imagine/templates/f…Luxe Hotel Balcony Nightgrok.com/imagine/templates/1…Car Seat Confident Selfiegrok.com/imagine/templates/8…Sunset Window Lightgrok.com/imagine/templates/d…Casual Couch Posegrok.com/imagine/templates/b…Nighttime Hoodiegrok.com/imagine/templates/2…Morning Light Naturalgrok.com/imagine/templates/a…Sparkly Top & Jeans Night Outgrok.com/imagine/templates/c…Little Black Dressgrok.com/imagine/templates/a…Little Black Dress 2grok.com/imagine/templates/f…Red Bodycon Style Going Outgrok.com/imagine/templates/f…Metallic Jacket Club Lookgrok.com/imagine/templates/4…Pastel Club Set Coordinationgrok.com/imagine/templates/4…Rave Neon Body Dancegrok.com/imagine/templates/0…Rave Festival Body Wavegrok.com/imagine/templates/1…Silver Halter Dress 90s Club Mirror Selfiegrok.com/imagine/templates/d…Velvet Mini Dress 90s Club Selfiegrok.com/imagine/templates/8…Velvet Dress 90s Club Selfiegrok.com/imagine/templates/6…Templates modeled in video seen here:

item.title: @elonmusk: While we never want to be complacent about it, docking with the@Space_Stationhas become routine
item.description: While we never want to be complacent about it, docking with the@Space_Stationhas become routine

item.title: @elonmusk: LIVE: Watch as our next cargo mission docks to the@Space_Stationafter launching on May 15. The Space...
item.description: LIVE: Watch as our next cargo mission docks to the@Space_Stationafter launching on May 15. The SpaceX Dragon spacecraft is scheduled to arrive at the station at about 6:38am ET (1038 UTC), where it will remain until its return to Earth this summer.xcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1DGleElVO…

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build is improving like lightning
item.description: Grok Build is improving like lightning

item.title: @elonmusk: In April of 2021 horrible, racist graffiti was found in the stairwell at Albion College in Michigan....
item.description: In April of 2021 horrible, racist graffiti was found in the stairwell at Albion College in Michigan. Sprawled on the walls were hateful messages like "KKK White Power" & "Die N*gger Please" Liberals country-wide cried outrage!! Albion students were enraged and student marches were quickly organized to fight this evil racism! (see below) This incident was part of a string of racist incidents that started the month prior. Albion College later identified the perpetrator as a single student, a Black male. And suddenly no one at Albion College cared about racism anymore. The marches ceased immediately, the perpetrator's name was never released, and it was swept right under the rug. What are the odds of that...

item.title: @elonmusk: This was always and only the sole and exclusive purpose of the UK online censorship act, to help Lab...
item.description: This was always and only the sole and exclusive purpose of the UK online censorship act, to help Labour nuke its enemies

item.title: @elonmusk: If a director wants to cast a Black person in a White role, that is fine by me. Who am I to tell an ...
item.description: If a director wants to cast a Black person in a White role, that is fine by me. Who am I to tell an artist what to do? My problem is when the system, in this case the Oscars, incentivizes such behavior. Imagine you wanted to start a comedy group and instead of having the freedom to pick the five funniest people you know, you were forced to pick a woman, a Jew, a Chinese person, a Black person, and a Native American. That isn’t art. That’s social engineering, and it infuriates me.

item.title: @elonmusk: UPDATE: Grok has now surpassed 126 million posts on X. The growth is happening incredibly fast with ...
item.description: UPDATE: Grok has now surpassed 126 million posts on X. The growth is happening incredibly fast with millions of users interacting with Grok directly inside the platform every day. What started as an AI chatbot is quickly turning into one of the most active AI products integrated into a social network at global scale. The real advantage is the live feedback loop. Every interaction gives xAI more real-time data to improve Grok faster while users continue testing it across news coding research humor and daily conversations.

item.title: @elonmusk: She's a great actress but this would be insane
item.description: She's a great actress but this would be insane

item.title: @elonmusk: The best feature of@xaiGrok Build right now is how it handles subagents and personas. Most people st...
item.description: The best feature of@xaiGrok Build right now is how it handles subagents and personas. Most people still treat the model like one very smart intern that has to do everything at once. Grok Build took a different route: it gives you actual typed workers with defined roles and real restrictions. There are three main subagent types you can spawn: • general-purpose → full capabilities. Can read, write, run commands, and spawn other agents. • explore → deliberately read-only. Fast and safe when you just need to dig through a codebase without risk. • plan → also read-only, but optimized for high-reasoning architectural thinking. It comes back with structured plans and points out critical files. The fact that two of the three are read-only by design is intentional. You don’t want your researcher or your architect accidentally modifying code while it’s still exploring or thinking. On top of the types, you have personas: Personas like implementer, reviewer, security-auditor, or design-doc-writer carry actual contracts. The implementer knows it’s supposed to receive a review file and produce a summary file. The reviewer knows the exact structure it has to use for bugs, suggestions, and nits. This changes the game. Instead of one model trying (and usually failing) to be good at research, implementation, review, and security at the same time, you get real specialization and isolation. The primitive is still early, but it already feels meaningfully different from most “multi-agent” setups I’ve tried. I’ll post the second thread about what /implement actually does with these pieces.

item.title: @elonmusk: Okay, looks like /implement is the way to get Grok Build to run longer, just had my first 10 minute ...
item.description: Okay, looks like /implement is the way to get Grok Build to run longer, just had my first 10 minute run 💪 What's really neat is it's super critical of itself, essentially finds its own bugs, and then puts together subagents to address all the open issues.

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 now has over a billion downloads
item.description: 𝕏 now has over a billion downloads
